events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track where his drumming really shines?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember the first video they played? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, propelling them to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! An album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969 in upstate New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival began! Three days of peace, love, and music that became a cultural phenomenon. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years ago, we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. The King's legacy lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur shooting
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in a drive-by incident in Las Vegas. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world was rocked by the shooting of Tupac Shakur. His impact on hip-hop and culture is still felt today. What's his most iconic track for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: On this day in 1970, the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away at the age of 27. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His guitar mastery remains unparalleled. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks! What's your go-to song from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem, 'Imagine', was released as a single on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine' – a timeless message of peace and unity. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple announced the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: The Original iPod
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple announced the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever. Did you have one?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks Global James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 64 years of 007. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's your top Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On this day, we remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
